code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [FinTech_Ledger] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [FinTech_Ledger] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [FinTech_Gate] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [FinTech_Gate]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流画一个状态图。核心流程是：用户从FinTech_Ledger登录后，先判断是否需要备份数据。如果不需要，直接进入StartWorkflow；如果需要，还要检查网络是否可用。网络可用就走BackupToNetwork，不可用就走到RemainingBackup。
明白了。那BackupToNetwork和RemainingBackup这两个状态需要加说明吗？看您的描述，RemainingBackup应该是网络不可用时的滞留状态，用户可能需要知道怎么处理未备份的数据。
对，两个都要加备注。BackupToNetwork旁边提醒用户备份目录还有未保存的生产数据，询问是否立即传输到网络驱动器。RemainingBackup那边要说明数据尚未备份且网络驱动器不可用，无法传输。
好的，这两个备注我加上了。接下来StartWorkflow之后的分支您怎么设计？我看到代码里还有MesDataToNetwork和Crash的处理。
StartWorkflow完成后正常走到FinishWorkflow，但也可能触发MesDataToNetwork去传输数据。这个传输节点比较关键——成功的话回到StartWorkflow继续，或者直接结束到FinishWorkflow；失败的话会进入Crash状态。Crash之后可以走到FinishWorkflow，也可以尝试Backup。
Crash状态的错误处理好像很复杂，我看到有多条备注。是需要区分不同的故障场景吗？比如打包传输失败、CSV生成失败、数据库查询失败这些？
没错，Crash要放五条备注。右边三条分别是：打包生产数据导出文件传输失败、备份到备份目录失败、生成zip文件时出错。左边两条是：生成CSV数据出错、查询数据库最后一条记录时出错。每种情况都要告诉用户怎么手动处理，或者联系Ersa服务。
所有Crash的备注都按左右位置加好了。最后确认一下整体结构：顶部加个总标题"This is a state description of HR600 Workflow"，FinTech_Ledger作为入口，FinishWorkflow回到FinTech_Ledger闭环，还有FinTech_Gate作为辅助节点放在底部。这样是否完整？
elements_involved: This is a state description of HR600 Workflow

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，结构完整了。FinTech_Gate作为系统边界标记放在底部即可，不需要连接其他状态。整个流程从登录到完成，覆盖了正常路径、网络备份分支、以及各类异常处理，可以定稿了。
